title: Frontend Test & MSW Hardening
description: Fix failing frontend tests from missing MSW handlers for new agentic routes.

userStories.title: Shared MSW handlers for agentic APIs
userStories.description: Handlers for agent/activity, copilot, email-events, apply-pack, mock-interview, brief missions in passthroughHandlers.js.

userStories.title: Fix Settings and Nav test wrappers
userStories.notes: TooltipProvider + passthroughHandlers in Settings.test.jsx and NavBar.test.jsx; 20/20 pass.

userStories.title: Fix page test failures batch 1
userStories.notes: Analytics color tokens, JobBoard AuthProvider+MSW, Login /today redirect, Dashboard dialog assertion; 37/37 pass.

userStories.title: Fix page test failures batch 2
userStories.description: OfferComparison, Pricing, PublicPipeline, Tags, GithubCallback, ApplicationList bulk-delete.
